subject: Help us update our records!
body:
Customize Your SiriusXM Experience

Here are some benefits you'll enjoy when you tell us what you like.

Get a Personalized e-Newsletter

There's always something going on here at SiriusXM. To stay on top of
all your favorite programming, tell us what you like and we'll customize
your SiriusXM Highlights newsletter to include the info that matters
most to you.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/pref?password=B7gW-gNswCpzBSeWy7O6r$EJpa4wa2 

Print Your Custom Channel Guide

Create a customized channel guide for your car or home based on what you
like to listen to. 
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/pref?password=B7gW-gNswCpzBSeWy7O6r$EJpa4wa2 

Receive Exclusive Invites

Get the chance to attend exclusive SiriusXM events and in-studio
performances by your favorite celebrities. 
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/pref?password=B7gW-gNswCpzBSeWy7O6r$EJpa4wa2 

------------------------------------------------------------

To ensure that you continue receiving SiriusXM emails, please add us to
your address book or safe list. To unsubscribe, please click here:
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/unsub?password=B7gW-gNswCpzBSeWy7O6r$EJpa4wa2

NOTE: Please allow up to 10 business days for your preferences to be
applied. You may still receive service-related emails if the email
address is associated with your subscriber account.

Have you moved or changed your billing information? Please take a minute
now to update your account information:
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/update

You can read our entire Privacy Policy:
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/privacy

Sirius XM Radio Inc.
1221 Avenue of the Americas
New York, NY 10020
www.siriusxm.com
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/siriusxm 

Schedule and channel assignments are subject to change. Check
siriusxm.com for the latest updates.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSeWy7B7gW-gB82QDaNswCpzsJ/siriusxm

(C) 2013 Sirius XM Radio Inc. Sirius, XM and all related marks and logos
are trademarks of Sirius XM Radio Inc. All other marks, channel names
and logos are the property of their respective owners. All rights
reserved.
body_html:
If you are unable to see the message below, click here to view.





Dear Siriusxm Listener,

We want to confirm (jeeproject@yahoo.com) is still the primary and correct email address that is associated with your SiriusXM® Satellite Radio subscription. Please click here to confirm your email address.


We respect your privacy. You can review SiriusXM's privacy policy here

You can set your Listening Preferences to take advantage of all the opportunities available to SiriusXM listeners including exclusive invitations to concerts & events breaking info about new/updated channels, and more!
If you wish to opt-out of future email communications from SiriusXM, please click here.




You are receiving this email because you previously indicated that you'd like to receive email updates from SiriusXM Radio. If you no longer wish to receive our email newsletter, you may unsubscribe here.

NOTE: Please allow up to 10 business days for your preferences to be applied. You may still receive service-related emails if the email address is associated with your subscriber account.

Have you moved or changed your billing information? Please take a minute now to update your account information.

You can read our entire Privacy Policy.

© 2013 Sirius XM Radio Inc. Sirius, XM and all related marks and logos are trademarks of Sirius XM Radio Inc. and its subsidiaries. All other marks, channel names and logos are the property of their respective owners. All rights reserved.
